name: 02_single_holding_p_equals_v
description: Single qualifying holding where last_price == vwap -> diff contribution is 0, but the holding still counts toward valid_vwap_weight.
derivation: AAPL is in live_vwaps; v=100.0 > 0. Contribution: alloc*(p-v)/v = 0.5*(100.0-100.0)/100.0 = 0.5*0.0 = 0.0. valid_vwap_weight += 0.5. Final: (0.0, 0.5).
